data_description.name: Friendly name for this subwoofer in Home Assistant.

bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to set up {name} ({address})?
bluetooth_confirm.title: Confirm SVS Subwoofer

data_description.address: Bluetooth MAC address of the subwoofer (e.g., 08:EB:ED:11:22:33).
data_description.name: Friendly name for this subwoofer in Home Assistant.

manual.description: Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of your SVS subwoofer. Format: {mac_format}
manual.title: Manual setup

data_description.address: The SVS subwoofer to set up.
data_description.name: Friendly name for this subwoofer in Home Assistant. Leave blank to use the device's advertised Bluetooth name.

user.description: Select your subwoofer from the list. Devices marked [SVS] are detected SVS subwoofers. Leave the name blank to use the device's advertised name.
user.title: Add SVS Subwoofer

device_not_found.message: SVS subwoofer device {device_id} not found or not loaded.

load_preset.description: Loads the same preset on multiple SVS subwoofers simultaneously.

preset.description: The preset to load (1, 2, 3, or default).
preset.name: Preset

load_preset.name: Load preset

set_volume.description: Sets volume on multiple SVS subwoofers simultaneously, with optional per-device offsets.

offsets.description: Optional volume offsets per device (device_id to dB offset mapping). Useful for room correction.
offsets.name: Per-device offsets

volume.description: The volume level in dB (-60 to 0).
volume.name: Volume

set_volume.name: Set volume

sync_from.description: Copies all settings from one SVS subwoofer to one or more other subwoofers.

source_device_id.description: The subwoofer to copy settings from.
source_device_id.name: Source device

target_device_ids.description: The subwoofer(s) to copy settings to.
target_device_ids.name: Target devices

sync_from.name: Sync settings from
